payload.content: Implements cache stampede prevention with two complementary strategies: (1) Single-flight/mutex pattern ensures only one goroutine fetches from DB on cache miss, all others wait and reuse the result. (2) Probabilistic early expiry randomly refreshes cache 10% of the time before TTL expires, preventing simultaneous expiry. Together these eliminate thundering herd problems in Redis-backed systems.
payload.summary: Redis cache stampede prevention using single-flight pattern and probabilistic early expiry. When cache expires simultaneously for many requests, only one request fetches from the database while others wait. Probabilistic early expiry refreshes cache before it actually expires, eliminating stampede risk entirely in high-traffic scenarios.
strategy: Analyze redis_cache_stampede_prevention problem: identify root cause, measure impact, define success criteria
Implement solution using cache_stampede, thundering_herd, redis_mutex patterns with production-grade error handling
Verify correctness with integration tests, benchmark performance, document edge cases and limitations

bundle_gene.trigger_text: cache_stampede,thundering_herd,redis_mutex,cache_miss,singleflight,postgresql cdc sync,kubernetes hpa autoscaling,ebpf network traffic analysis,node.js event loop optimization,docker compose network isolation
